conversation.content: For local agent memory work, keep the current working mem0 setup as the rollback path. Do not replace nomic until a candidate beats it.
Understood. I will treat nomic as the rollback baseline while testing candidates separately.
Run the benchmark now, and by the way the progress spinner is still moving.
I will wait for the benchmark to finish and report the result.
The Hermes training artifacts should stay on /Volumes/PortableSSD/hermes-exports, not in the git repository.
I will keep large exports on the SSD artifact path and keep Git for source, configs, and reports.
